title: bufonia perennis
intro: Bufonia perennis, also known as Rock Jasmine, is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bufonia perennis include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Bufonia perennis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat these conditions.
